lessons.title: 1-倒装句的定义与分类
lessons.content:
### 倒装句的核心定义
倒装句是将英语句子中**正常语序（主语+谓语）** 颠倒的句式，目的是强调句子某一成分（如地点、时间、否定词等）、满足语法结构要求或使表达更生动。英语中倒装分为**完全倒装**（整个谓语移到主语前）和**部分倒装**（仅助动词/情态动词移到主语前，实义动词仍在主语后），是初中至高中英语的核心考点，中考侧重基础倒装结构，高考则考查复杂场景下的倒装应用。

### 倒装句的核心分类（按结构划分）
#### 分类1：完全倒装（Full Inversion）
**定义**：把整个谓语动词（通常是不及物动词，如be/come/go/stand/lie等）放到主语前面，主语多为名词（代词作主语时不倒装）。
**核心场景**：强调地点、方向或时间，常见于“地点/方位副词/介词短语+谓语+主语”结构。

#### 分类2：部分倒装（Partial Inversion）
**定义**：仅将助动词（do/does/did/have/has/had）、情态动词（can/may/will/should等）或be动词提到主语前，实义动词保留在主语后；若句中无助动词/情态动词，需添加do/does/did构成倒装。
**核心场景**：否定词前置、only+状语前置、so/neither/nor表“也/也不”、虚拟条件句省略if、as/though引导让步状语从句等。

examples.sentence: Here comes the bus.
examples.translation: 公交车来了。
examples.analysis: 地点副词here置于句首，谓语动词comes放到主语the bus前，属于完全倒装；主语是名词the bus，符合完全倒装条件，若主语是代词（Here it comes.）则不倒装。

examples.sentence: Never have I seen such a beautiful place.
examples.translation: 我从未见过如此美丽的地方。
examples.explanation: 否定词never置于句首，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为I have never seen such a beautiful place.，将助动词have提到主语I前，实义动词seen保留在主语后，构成部分倒装。

examples.sentence: On the wall hang two beautiful paintings.
examples.translation: 墙上挂着两幅漂亮的画。
examples.analysis: 介词短语On the wall置于句首，强调地点，谓语动词hang放到主语two beautiful paintings前，属于完全倒装；主语是复数名词，谓语用原形hang。

examples.sentence: Only in this way can you solve the problem.
examples.translation: 只有用这种方法，你才能解决这个问题。
examples.analysis: only+介词短语In this way置于句首，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为You can solve the problem only in this way.，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词solve保留在主语后。

examples.sentence: So tired was she that she fell asleep at once.
examples.translation: 她太累了，立刻就睡着了。
examples.analysis: so+形容词tired置于句首，表程度强调，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为She was so tired that she fell asleep at once.，将be动词was提到主语she前。

examples.sentence: Neither does he smoke nor does he drink.
examples.translation: 他既不抽烟也不喝酒。
examples.analysis: 否定词neither/nor置于句首，表“也不”，需部分倒装；前半句将助动词does提到主语he前，后半句同理，实义动词smoke/drink保留在主语后。

examples.sentence: Were I you, I would take the chance.
examples.translation: 如果我是你，我会抓住这个机会。
examples.analysis: 虚拟条件句省略if，将be动词were提到主语I前，属于部分倒装；原句正常语序为If I were you, I would take the chance.。

examples.sentence: Child as he is, he knows a lot.
examples.translation: 尽管他是个孩子，但他懂得很多。
examples.analysis: as引导让步状语从句，将表语Child提到句首，需部分倒装；注意名词表语前置时不加冠词（不用a child），这是as倒装的特殊规则。

examples.sentence: Out rushed the children when the bell rang.
examples.translation: 铃声一响，孩子们就冲了出去。
examples.analysis: 方位副词Out置于句首，强调动作方向，谓语动词rushed放到主语the children前，属于完全倒装；主语是名词，符合完全倒装要求。

examples.sentence: Not until he finished his homework did he watch TV.
examples.translation: 直到完成作业，他才看电视。
examples.analysis: not until+从句置于句首，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为He didn't watch TV until he finished his homework.，将助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词watch用原形。

exercises.question: ___ the door when a gust of wind blew in.
exercises.explanation: 地点副词Here/There/Out/In等置于句首时，完全倒装结构为“副词+谓语+主语”，本句还原正常语序为The door opened when a gust of wind blew in.，此处用opened符合完全倒装的谓语形式。

exercises.question: Never ___ such a wonderful film before.
exercises.explanation: 否定词Never置于句首，需部分倒装，将助动词have提到主语I前，实义动词seen保留，正常语序为I have never seen such a wonderful film before.。

exercises.question: Only by practicing speaking every day ___ English well.
exercises.explanation: only+介词短语by practicing speaking every day置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词learn保留，正常语序为You can learn English well only by practicing speaking every day.。

exercises.question: On the top of the mountain ___ a tall tree.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语On the top of the mountain置于句首，完全倒装结构为“介词短语+谓语+主语”，主语a tall tree是单数，谓语用第三人称单数stands，正常语序为A tall tree stands on the top of the mountain.。

exercises.question: So excited ___ that she couldn't say a word.
exercises.explanation: so+形容词excited置于句首，表程度强调，需部分倒装，将be动词was提到主语she前，正常语序为She was so excited that she couldn't say a word.。

exercises.question: Neither ___ interested in playing computer games nor ___ his brother.
exercises.explanation: neither置于句首表“也不”，需部分倒装，第一空将is提到主语he前；nor后接的句子同样需倒装，省略重复主语he，仅保留is。

exercises.question: ___ I you, I would not accept the offer.
exercises.explanation: 虚拟条件句省略if时，需将be动词were提到主语I前（部分倒装），原句正常语序为If I were you, I would not accept the offer.，虚拟语气中be动词统一用were。

exercises.question: Not only ___ late, but also he forgot his books.
exercises.explanation: not only置于句首，需部分倒装，将be动词was提到主语he前，正常语序为He was not only late, but also he forgot his books.。

exercises.question: Child ___ he is, he can speak three languages.
exercises.explanation: as引导让步状语从句时，需将表语/状语/动词提到句首，且名词表语前置时不加冠词（Child而非A child）；although引导让步状语从句不倒装，if表条件，均不符合语境。

exercises.question: Not until the rain stopped ___ home.
exercises.explanation: not until+从句置于句首，需部分倒装，原句正常语序为He didn't go home until the rain stopped.，将助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词go用原形。

exercises.question: In the river ___ some fish swimming happily.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语In the river置于句首，完全倒装结构为“介词短语+谓语+主语”，主语some fish是复数（fish单复数同形），谓语用are，正常语序为Some fish are swimming happily in the river.。

exercises.question: Seldom ___ to the cinema on weekends.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Seldom置于句首，需部分倒装，主语she是第三人称单数，添加助动词does提到主语前，实义动词go用原形，正常语序为She seldom goes to the cinema on weekends.。

exercises.question: Only when you grow up ___ the meaning of life.
exercises.explanation: only+时间状语从句when you grow up置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词understand保留，正常语序为You can understand the meaning of life only when you grow up.。

exercises.question: Down ___ the apple when I picked it.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Down置于句首，完全倒装结构为“副词+谓语+主语”，本句描述过去发生的动作，谓语用fell，正常语序为The apple fell down when I picked it.。

exercises.question: ___ that he had made a mistake did he apologize.
exercises.explanation: only+介词短语after realizing that he had made a mistake置于句首，需部分倒装，原句正常语序为He apologized only after realizing that he had made a mistake.，选项中Only after realizing符合倒装的前置结构要求。

exercises.question: So fast ___ that we couldn't catch up with him.
exercises.explanation: so+副词fast置于句首，需部分倒装，原句正常语序为He ran so fast that we couldn't catch up with him.，添加助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词run用原形。

exercises.question: Nowhere ___ better food than in this restaurant.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Nowhere置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词find保留，正常语序为You can find better food nowhere than in this restaurant.。

exercises.question: Hardly ___ the room when the phone rang.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Hardly置于句首，需部分倒装，且Hardly...when...结构中，hardly后用过去完成时，将had提到主语he前，实义动词entered保留，正常语序为He had hardly entered the room when the phone rang.。

exercises.question: Up ___ the kite into the sky.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Up置于句首，完全倒装结构为“副词+谓语+主语”，本句描述过去的动作，谓语用flew，正常语序为The kite flew up into the sky.。

exercises.question: Little ___ about his own safety when he saved the girl.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Little置于句首，需部分倒装，原句正常语序为He cared little about his own safety when he saved the girl.，添加助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词care用原形。

lessons.title: 2-完全倒装的详细用法
lessons.content:
### 完全倒装的核心定义
完全倒装是将**整个谓语动词**（无助动词/情态动词时）移到主语之前的倒装形式，核心特征是“谓语在前，主语在后”，且主语必须是**名词**（若主语为代词，如it/he/she等，不适用完全倒装）。完全倒装的核心目的是强调地点、方位、时间等，使句子表达更生动，是中考英语的基础倒装考点。

### 完全倒装的核心场景（中考必考）
#### 场景1：方位/地点副词置于句首
常见方位/地点副词：here、there、out、in、up、down、away、off、back等，置于句首时，强调动作的方向或发生的地点，需用完全倒装。
- 基本结构：方位/地点副词 + 谓语动词 + 名词主语
- 例句：There goes the bell.（铃响了。）；Away flew the bird.（鸟儿飞走了。）
- 注意：主语为代词时不倒装，如Here it is.（给你。）；Out he rushed.（他冲了出去。）

#### 场景2：介词短语表地点置于句首
当介词短语（如on the wall、in the park、at the foot of the mountain等）置于句首，强调动作发生的地点，且主语为名词时，用完全倒装。
- 基本结构：介词短语 + 谓语动词 + 名词主语
- 例句：On the wall hang two maps.（墙上挂着两张地图。）；At the foot of the hill lies a small village.（山脚下有一个小村庄。）
- 注意：谓语动词的单复数由主语决定（主语是复数，谓语用原形/复数；主语是单数，谓语用第三人称单数）。

#### 场景3：表时间/存在的句型（there be句型拓展）
there be句型本身就是完全倒装的典型，拓展形式包括there stand/lie/exist/appear/seem等，强调“某地有某物/存在某情况”。
- 基本结构：There + 谓语动词（be/stand/lie等） + 名词主语
- 例句：There stands a tall building near the park.（公园附近矗立着一栋高楼。）；There exists a big problem in the plan.（这个计划里存在一个大问题。）

#### 场景4：such置于句首表“这样的人/事物”
such作代词置于句首，强调“这样的……”，需用完全倒装。
- 基本结构：Such + 谓语动词 + 名词主语
- 例句：Such was the story he told us.（他给我们讲的就是这样一个故事。）；Such were his words.（他就是这么说的。）

### 完全倒装的使用禁忌
1. 主语为代词时，不可用完全倒装，如：错→Here comes he.；对→Here he comes.；
2. 谓语动词为及物动词时，不可用完全倒装（完全倒装的谓语多为不及物动词：be/come/go/stand/lie/fly等），如：错→On the desk put a book.；对→On the desk lies a book.；
3. 句子含助动词/情态动词时，不适用完全倒装（需用部分倒装），如：错→Here will come the bus.；对→Here comes the bus.（无情态动词，完全倒装）/Will the bus come here?（有情态动词，部分倒装）。

examples.sentence: There comes the last bus.
examples.translation: 最后一班公交车来了。
examples.analysis: 地点副词There置于句首，强调“公交车到来的地点/场景”，主语the last bus是名词，谓语comes放到主语前，属于完全倒装；若主语是代词（There it comes.）则不倒装。

examples.sentence: In the forest live many kinds of animals.
examples.translation: 森林里生活着多种动物。
examples.analysis: 介词短语In the forest置于句首，强调地点，主语many kinds of animals是复数名词，谓语live放到主语前，属于完全倒装；谓语单复数由主语决定，此处用live（复数）。

examples.answer: There lies a big lake in the middle of the park.
examples.translation: 公园中央有一个大湖。
examples.analysis: there lie是there be句型的拓展，属于完全倒装，主语a big lake是单数名词，谓语用lies（第三人称单数），强调“公园中央存在一个大湖”。

examples.sentence: Away went the children with their parents.
examples.translation: 孩子们和父母一起离开了。
examples.analysis: 方位副词Away置于句首，强调“离开的方向”，主语the children with their parents是名词短语，谓语went放到主语前，属于完全倒装；描述过去动作，谓语用过去式went。

examples.sentence: Such is the power of love.
examples.translation: 这就是爱的力量。
examples.analysis: 代词Such置于句首，强调“这样的力量”，主语the power of love是单数名词，谓语is放到主语前，属于完全倒装；Such作代词时，谓语单复数由主语决定。

examples.sentence: On the top of the hill stands an old temple.
examples.translation: 山顶上矗立着一座古老的寺庙。
examples.analysis: 介词短语On the top of the hill置于句首，强调地点，主语an old temple是单数名词，谓语stands放到主语前，属于完全倒装；谓语用第三人称单数stands。

examples.sentence: Here are your books.
examples.translation: 你的书在这里。
examples.analysis: 地点副词Here置于句首，主语your books是复数名词，谓语are放到主语前，属于完全倒装；主语是复数，谓语用are。

examples.sentence: Down fell the leaves in autumn.
examples.translation: 秋天，树叶落了下来。
examples.analysis: 方位副词Down置于句首，强调“树叶落下的方向”，主语the leaves是复数名词，谓语fell放到主语前，属于完全倒装；描述过去动作，谓语用fell（fall的过去式）。

examples.sentence: At the gate of the school wait some parents.
examples.translation: 学校门口等着一些家长。
examples.analysis: 介词短语At the gate of the school置于句首，强调地点，主语some parents是复数名词，谓语wait放到主语前，属于完全倒装；谓语用原形wait（复数）。

examples.sentence: Such were the results of the experiment.
examples.translation: 实验的结果就是这样。
examples.analysis: 代词Such置于句首，主语the results of the experiment是复数名词，谓语were放到主语前，属于完全倒装；谓语用were（复数），与主语保持一致。

exercises.question: Here ___ the bus we are waiting for.
exercises.explanation: 地点副词Here置于句首，主语the bus是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用第三人称单数comes，正常语序为The bus we are waiting for comes here.。

exercises.question: In the garden ___ many beautiful flowers.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语In the garden置于句首，主语many beautiful flowers是复数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用原形grow，正常语序为Many beautiful flowers grow in the garden.。

exercises.question: There ___ a small river near my hometown.
exercises.explanation: there lie是完全倒装结构，主语a small river是单数名词，谓语用第三人称单数lies，强调“家乡附近有一条小河”，正常语序为A small river lies near my hometown.。

exercises.question: Away ___ when he heard the bad news.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Away置于句首时，若主语是代词he，不可用完全倒装，需用正常语序he ran，因此答案为A（注：选项B/C重复，正确形式为he ran）。

exercises.question: Such ___ his dream of becoming a doctor.
exercises.explanation: 代词Such置于句首，主语his dream of becoming a doctor是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用is，正常语序为His dream of becoming a doctor is such.。

exercises.question: On the wall ___ a famous painting by Picasso.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语On the wall置于句首，主语a famous painting by Picasso是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用第三人称单数hangs，正常语序为A famous painting by Picasso hangs on the wall.。

exercises.question: Here ___ my parents and my sister.
exercises.explanation: 地点副词Here置于句首，主语my parents and my sister是复数，完全倒装结构中谓语用are，正常语序为My parents and my sister are here.。

exercises.question: Down ___ the rain from the sky.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Down置于句首，主语the rain是单数名词，但本句描述过去的动作，完全倒装结构中谓语用过去式poured，正常语序为The rain poured down from the sky.。

exercises.question: At the end of the street ___ a big supermarket.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语At the end of the street置于句首，主语a big supermarket是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用第三人称单数stands，正常语序为A big supermarket stands at the end of the street.。

exercises.question: Such ___ the words he said to me yesterday.
exercises.explanation: 代词Such置于句首，主语the words he said to me yesterday是复数名词，且描述过去的动作，完全倒装结构中谓语用were，正常语序为The words he said to me yesterday were such.。

exercises.question: There ___ some milk in the glass.
exercises.explanation: there be是完全倒装结构，主语some milk是不可数名词，谓语用is，强调“杯子里有一些牛奶”，正常语序为Some milk is in the glass.。

exercises.question: Out ___ the birds when the sun rose.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Out置于句首，主语the birds是复数名词，且描述过去的动作，完全倒装结构中谓语用过去式flew，正常语序为The birds flew out when the sun rose.。

exercises.question: In the classroom ___ a teacher and thirty students.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语In the classroom置于句首，主语a teacher and thirty students是复数，完全倒装结构中谓语用are，遵循“就近原则”（靠近谓语的a teacher是单数，但整体主语为复数），正常语序为A teacher and thirty students are in the classroom.。

exercises.question: Such ___ the truth that few people know.
exercises.explanation: 代词Such置于句首，主语the truth that few people know是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用is，正常语序为The truth that few people know is such.。

exercises.question: Up ___ the balloon into the air slowly.
exercises.explanation: 方位副词Up置于句首，主语the balloon是单数名词，且描述过去的动作，完全倒装结构中谓语用过去式rose，正常语序为The balloon rose up into the air slowly.。

exercises.question: On the desk ___ two pens and a notebook.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语On the desk置于句首，主语two pens and a notebook是复数，完全倒装结构中谓语用are，正常语序为Two pens and a notebook are on the desk.。

exercises.question: There ___ a lot of trees on both sides of the road.
exercises.explanation: there stand是完全倒装结构，主语a lot of trees是复数名词，谓语用原形stand，正常语序为A lot of trees stand on both sides of the road.。

exercises.question: Here ___ the letter you have been looking forward to.
exercises.explanation: 地点副词Here置于句首，主语the letter you have been looking forward to是单数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用is，正常语序为The letter you have been looking forward to is here.。

exercises.question: In the deep sea ___ many strange sea creatures.
exercises.explanation: 介词短语In the deep sea置于句首，主语many strange sea creatures是复数名词，完全倒装结构中谓语用原形live，正常语序为Many strange sea creatures live in the deep sea.。

exercises.question: Such ___ the experiences I had during the trip.
exercises.explanation: 代词Such置于句首，主语the experiences I had during the trip是复数名词，且描述过去的经历，完全倒装结构中谓语用were，正常语序为The experiences I had during the trip were such.。

lessons.title: 3-部分倒装的详细用法
lessons.content:
### 部分倒装的核心定义
部分倒装是将句子中的**助动词、情态动词或be动词** 提到主语之前，**实义动词仍保留在主语之后** 的倒装形式；若句子中无助动词/情态动词/be动词，需添加do/does/did（根据时态/人称）构成倒装。部分倒装的核心目的是强调否定意义、程度、条件等，是中考/高考英语的重点倒装考点，考查频率远高于完全倒装。

### 部分倒装的核心场景（中考/高考必考）
#### 场景1：否定词/否定短语置于句首
否定词/短语前置时，需用部分倒装，核心否定词/短语：never、seldom、hardly、scarcely、rarely、little、few、no sooner...than...、hardly...when...、not only...but also...、not until、at no time、in no way、by no means、under no circumstances等。
- 基本结构：否定词/短语 + 助动词/情态动词/be动词 + 主语 + 实义动词（+其他）
- 例句：Never have I seen such a brave man.（我从未见过如此勇敢的人。）；Not until he called me did I know the news.（直到他打电话给我，我才知道这个消息。）
- 注意：no sooner...than.../hardly...when...结构中，no sooner/hardly后用过去完成时，than/when后用一般过去时，如：No sooner had he left than it began to rain.（他刚走，天就下雨了。）

#### 场景2：only+状语（副词/介词短语/从句）置于句首
only+状语（时间、地点、方式、条件等）前置时，需用部分倒装，强调“只有……才……”。
- 基本结构：Only + 状语 + 助动词/情态动词/be动词 + 主语 + 实义动词（+其他）
- 例句：Only then did I realize my mistake.（直到那时，我才意识到我的错误。）；Only if you work hard can you succeed.（只有努力工作，你才能成功。）
- 注意：only+主语前置时，不倒装，如：Only he knows the secret.（只有他知道这个秘密。）

#### 场景3：so/neither/nor置于句首表“也/也不”
so表“……也一样”、neither/nor表“……也不”时，需用部分倒装，替代前文提到的情况，避免重复。
- 基本结构：So/Neither/Nor + 助动词/情态动词/be动词 + 主语
- 例句：He can swim. So can I.（他会游泳，我也会。）；She doesn't like coffee. Neither do I.（她不喜欢咖啡，我也不喜欢。）
- 注意：so+主语+助动词/情态动词/be动词表“确实如此”，不倒装，如：He is tired. So he is.（他累了，确实如此。）

#### 场景4：so/such...that...结构中，so/such置于句首
so+形容词/副词、such+名词短语置于句首，强调程度，需用部分倒装。
- 基本结构：So+形容词/副词/Such+名词短语 + 助动词/情态动词/be动词 + 主语 + 实义动词 + that从句
- 例句：So difficult was the exam that many students failed.（考试如此难，以至于很多学生不及格。）；Such a clever boy is he that he can solve the problem easily.（他是个如此聪明的男孩，能轻松解决这个问题。）

#### 场景5：虚拟条件句省略if
虚拟条件句中，若省略if，需将were/had/should提到主语之前，构成部分倒装。
- 基本结构：Were/Had/Should + 主语 + 其他（+主句）
- 例句：Were I you, I would ask for help.（如果我是你，我会求助。）；Had he studied hard, he would have passed the exam.（他要是努力学习，就会通过考试了。）；Should you need any help, please call me.（如果你需要帮助，请打电话给我。）

#### 场景6：as/though引导让步状语从句
as/though引导让步状语从句时，需将表语、状语或动词提到句首，构成部分倒装；若表语是名词，需省略冠词。
- 基本结构：表语/状语/动词 + as/though + 主语 + 谓语（剩余部分）
- 例句：Young as he is, he knows a lot.（尽管他年轻，但他懂得很多。）；Hard though he tried, he failed.（尽管他努力了，但还是失败了。）；Try as he might, he couldn't open the door.（尽管他尽力了，但还是打不开门。）

#### 场景7：表示“也”的so it is with.../it is the same with...拓展
当前文既有肯定又有否定，或既有系动词又有实义动词时，用so it is with.../it is the same with...，也可倒装为So it is with + 主语/It is the same with + 主语。
- 例句：He likes singing and he doesn't like dancing. So it is with me.（他喜欢唱歌，不喜欢跳舞。我也一样。）

### 部分倒装的使用禁忌
1. 否定词仅修饰主语时，不倒装，如：No students are in the classroom.（教室里没有学生。）（no修饰主语students，不倒装）；
2. only+主语前置时，不倒装，如：Only Tom can answer this question.（只有汤姆能回答这个问题。）（only修饰主语Tom，不倒装）；
3. as/though引导让步状语从句时，若倒装的是动词，需保留情态动词/助动词，如：Try as he may, he won't succeed.（而非Try as he may succeed.）。

examples.sentence: Seldom does she go to the cinema alone.
examples.translation: 她很少一个人去看电影。
examples.analysis: 否定副词Seldom置于句首，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为She seldom goes to the cinema alone.，主语she是第三人称单数，添加助动词does提到主语前，实义动词goes还原为go。

examples.sentence: Only by working hard can you achieve your goal.
examples.translation: 只有努力工作，你才能实现目标。
examples.analysis: only+介词短语by working hard置于句首，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为You can achieve your goal only by working hard.，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词achieve保留在主语后。

examples.sentence: He has finished his homework. So have I.
examples.translation: 他完成了作业，我也完成了。
examples.analysis: so置于句首表“也”，需部分倒装；原句前半句用现在完成时，因此倒装结构为So + have（助动词） + I（主语），替代“I have finished my homework too.”，避免重复。

examples.sentence: So hard did he work that he won the first prize.
examples.translation: 他工作如此努力，以至于获得了一等奖。
examples.analysis: so+副词hard置于句首，强调程度，需部分倒装；原句正常语序为He worked so hard that he won the first prize.，添加助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词work还原为原形。

examples.sentence: Had he known the truth, he would have told us.
examples.translation: 如果他知道真相，他就会告诉我们了。
examples.analysis: 虚拟条件句省略if，将had（过去完成时助动词）提到主语he前，构成部分倒装；原句正常语序为If he had known the truth, he would have told us.。

examples.sentence: Hardly had she arrived home when the phone rang.
examples.translation: 她刚到家，电话就响了。
examples.analysis: hardly置于句首，需部分倒装；hardly...when...结构中，hardly后用过去完成时，将had提到主语she前，实义动词arrived保留，when后用一般过去时rang。

examples.sentence: Not only did he give me a book, but also he helped me with my study.
examples.translation: 他不仅给了我一本书，还帮助我学习。
examples.analysis: not only置于句首，需部分倒装；将助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词give还原为原形，but also后的句子不倒装。

examples.sentence: Little does he care about what others think of him.
examples.translation: 他几乎不在乎别人怎么看他。
examples.analysis: 否定副词Little置于句首，需部分倒装；主语he是第三人称单数，添加助动词does提到主语前，实义动词care用原形。

examples.sentence: Should you have any questions, please contact us.
examples.translation: 如果你有任何问题，请联系我们。
examples.analysis: 虚拟条件句省略if，将should提到主语you前，构成部分倒装；原句正常语序为If you should have any questions, please contact us.，此处是对将来的虚拟。

examples.sentence: Brave as he is, he is afraid of snakes.
examples.translation: 尽管他很勇敢，但他怕蛇。
examples.analysis: as引导让步状语从句，将表语Brave提到句首，构成部分倒装；表语是形容词，无需省略冠词，若表语是名词（如Child as he is），需省略冠词。

exercises.question: Never ___ to the park on Sundays when I was a child.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Never置于句首，需部分倒装；本句描述过去的动作，添加助动词did提到主语I前，实义动词go用原形，正常语序为I never went to the park on Sundays when I was a child.。

exercises.question: Only in this way ___ progress in your English study.
exercises.explanation: only+介词短语in this way置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词make保留，正常语序为You can make progress in your English study only in this way.。

exercises.question: She doesn't like swimming. ___ I.
exercises.explanation: neither置于句首表“也不”，需部分倒装；前半句用doesn't（一般现在时），因此倒装结构为Neither + do（助动词） + I（主语），am用于be动词场景，此处实义动词like用do。

exercises.question: So tired ___ that she couldn't keep her eyes open.
exercises.explanation: so+形容词tired置于句首，强调程度，需部分倒装，将be动词was提到主语she前，正常语序为She was so tired that she couldn't keep her eyes open.。

exercises.question: ___ I known the news earlier, I would have told you.
exercises.explanation: 虚拟条件句省略if，需将had（过去完成时助动词）提到主语I前，构成部分倒装，正常语序为If I had known the news earlier, I would have told you.。

exercises.question: Hardly ___ the office when the meeting began.
exercises.explanation: hardly置于句首，需部分倒装；hardly...when...结构中，hardly后用过去完成时，将had提到主语he前，实义动词entered保留，正常语序为He had hardly entered the office when the meeting began.。

exercises.question: Not only ___ late, but also he forgot to bring his notebook.
exercises.explanation: not only置于句首，需部分倒装，将be动词was提到主语he前，正常语序为He was not only late, but also he forgot to bring his notebook.。

exercises.question: Little ___ about his health, so he often gets sick.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Little置于句首，需部分倒装；主语he是第三人称单数，添加助动词does提到主语前，实义动词care用原形，正常语序为He cares little about his health, so he often gets sick.。

exercises.question: Should you ___ any help, please call me at any time.
exercises.explanation: 虚拟条件句省略if，将should提到主语you前，构成部分倒装，should后接动词原形need，正常语序为If you should need any help, please call me at any time.。

exercises.question: Young ___ he is, he has rich experience in teaching.
exercises.explanation: as引导让步状语从句时，需将表语Young提到句首，构成部分倒装；although引导让步状语从句不倒装，if表条件，均不符合语境。

exercises.question: No sooner ___ home than it began to rain heavily.
exercises.explanation: no sooner置于句首，需部分倒装；no sooner...than...结构中，no sooner后用过去完成时，将had提到主语he前，实义动词got保留，正常语序为He had no sooner got home than it began to rain heavily.。

exercises.question: Only when you finish your homework ___ watch TV.
exercises.explanation: only+时间状语从句when you finish your homework置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词can提到主语you前，实义动词watch保留，正常语序为You can watch TV only when you finish your homework.。

exercises.question: He can play the piano very well. ___ she.
exercises.explanation: so置于句首表“也”，需部分倒装；前半句用情态动词can，因此倒装结构为So + can + she，is用于be动词场景，neither表“也不”，不符合语境。

exercises.question: Such a difficult problem ___ that no one can solve it.
exercises.explanation: such+名词短语a difficult problem置于句首，强调程度，需部分倒装，将be动词is提到主语it前，正常语序为It is such a difficult problem that no one can solve it.。

exercises.question: Rarely ___ computer games since he entered high school.
exercises.explanation: 否定副词Rarely置于句首，需部分倒装；本句描述现在的习惯，主语he是第三人称单数，添加助动词does提到主语前，实义动词play用原形，正常语序为He rarely plays computer games since he entered high school.。

exercises.question: Were I ___, I would choose to study abroad.
exercises.explanation: 虚拟条件句省略if，将were提到主语I前，构成部分倒装，原句正常语序为If I were you, I would choose to study abroad.，此处需用宾格you作表语。

exercises.question: Not until the bell rang ___ the classroom.
exercises.explanation: not until+从句置于句首，需部分倒装；本句描述过去的动作，添加助动词did提到主语he前，实义动词leave用原形，正常语序为He didn't leave the classroom until the bell rang.。

exercises.question: By no means ___ give up halfway.
exercises.explanation: 否定短语By no means（绝不）置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词should提到主语we前，实义动词give保留，正常语序为We should by no means give up halfway.。

exercises.question: Fast ___ he ran, he couldn't catch up with the bus.
exercises.explanation: as/though引导让步状语从句时，均可将状语Fast提到句首，构成部分倒装，因此A和B均正确，正常语序为Though/As he ran fast, he couldn't catch up with the bus.。

exercises.question: At no time ___ the rules of the school.
exercises.explanation: 否定短语At no time（绝不）置于句首，需部分倒装，将情态动词should提到主语we前，实义动词break保留，正常语序为We should break the rules of the school at no time.。
